definition: The edge-anchored, sliding concrete member of the dialog family — a panel entering from a viewport inline edge (navigation drawer, filter panel, detail pane). It extends the abstract dialog substrate (inheriting focus containment, dismissal, backdrop, scroll-lock, mode, top-layer) and only fixes the configuration to an edge: the Modal Intent's placement: start | end (RTL-aware), with slide motion and swipe-to-dismiss added. Sibling of the centered modal (center) and bottom sheet (bottom).
usage: Realized by the Drawer block, a concrete member of the dialog family (droplist : dropdown :: dialog : drawer). It re-implements none of the dialog machinery — a drawer IS a dialog at an inline edge.
